div.head: CR–12. Editorial Note
div.p: Representatives of Costa Rica and the United States exchanged notes at Washington, March 4 and October 17, 1958, extending the Agreement establishing a Military Mission in Costa Rica for four years from December 10, 1957. For the text of these notes, see 11 UST (pt. 2) 2227. The Agreement was amended by notes exchanged at San José, February 25 and May 13, 1959, to bring Costa Rican payment procedures into conformity with United States law. For the text of the amendment, see 12 UST 901. The pertinent legislation is printed in 72 State 275.
